details.reasoning: Implementation is nearly complete and follows rubric requirements well. All major components are present: Stats(StatsArgs) variant, StatsArgs struct with human flag, cache_stats function with proper module registration and dispatch wiring, CacheBucket::iter() iteration with DiskUsage, ExitStatus::Success returns, human_readable_bytes usage, per-bucket and total output lines, and comprehensive tests. Preview feature properly registered. Code patterns match existing cache size command. Minor issue: display_name() method includes a Python bucket case, but test output shows only 10 buckets (missing Python between Environments and Binaries), suggesting either incomplete bucket coverage in CacheBucket::iter() or an unused code path. This inconsistency is minor and doesn't break functionality, but represents incomplete verification that all bucket variants are handled.
